value.fullName: Bank or building society account opening confirmation letter
value.label: Bank or building society account opening confirmation letter

value.fullName: Benefit statement, for example Child Benefit, Pension
value.label: Benefit statement, for example Child Benefit, Pension

value.fullName: Birth certificate - issued after time of birth
value.label: Birth certificate - issued after time of birth

value.fullName: Birth certificate - issued within 12 months of birth
value.label: Birth certificate - issued within 12 months of birth

value.fullName: Cards carrying the PASS accreditation logo
value.label: Cards carrying the PASS accreditation logo

value.fullName: Central or local government, government agency, or local council document giving entitlement
value.label: Central or local government, government agency, or local council document giving entitlement

value.fullName: Current driving licence (full or provisional) - paper version (if issued before 1998)
value.label: Current driving licence (full or provisional) - paper version (if issued before 1998)

value.fullName: Current driving licence photocard - (full or provisional)
value.label: Current driving licence photocard - (full or provisional)

value.fullName: Financial statement, for example pension or endowment
value.label: Financial statement, for example pension or endowment

value.fullName: Immigration document, visa or work permit
value.label: Immigration document, visa or work permit

value.fullName: Letter from head teacher or college principal
value.label: Letter from head teacher or college principal

value.fullName: Letter of sponsorship from future employment provider
value.label: Letter of sponsorship from future employment provider
